features: Urinary Tract Health Supplements: This complete 3-part regimen supports urinary tract and vaginal health*

Uqora Flush Drink Mix: Available in a delicious pink lemonade flavor, Flush helps to gently flush your urinary tract and delivers immune support for whole body health with ingredients like D-mannose, non-acidic vitamin C, and more*
Uqora Defend Capsules: Formulated with D-mannose, vitamin D3, green tea extract, and more to support bladder wall integrity, providing everyday urinary health support*
Uqora Promote Vaginal Probiotic: Get vaginal health support with Promote capsules, a probiotic supplement to help maintain healthy vaginal bacteria*
About Uqora: Uqora is committed to changing the urinary health landscape with education, product innovation, and building a community of support
ingredients: D-MANNOSE : Binds to microorganisms in the urine POTASSIUM CITRATE : Alkalizes the urine, unlocking the power of D-Mannose+ MAGNESIUM Essential nutrient lost , during urination VITAMIN C Immune system function+ VITAMIN B6 Foundational to whole body health+ CALCIUM Acts as an electrolyte, supporting fluid
parentTitle: Uqora Complete Regimen with Flush, Defend & Promote - Urinary Tract Support with D-Mannose, Vitamin C, Green Tea Extract, Probiotics & More - Comprehensive Bladder Health Support* - 3-Part Bundle
